'''ngachïfbïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracovian|cracovian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracovian|cracovian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngachïfbïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngæchïfbïfth || ngæchïfbïfj || ngæchïfbïfsh || ngæchïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngachïfchïfbïfth || ngachïfchïfbïfj || ngachïfchïfbïfsh || ngachïfchïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngachïfbïfth || ngachïfbïfj || ngachïfbïfsh || ngachïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngachïffbïffth || ngachïffbïffj || ngachïffbïffsh || ngachïffbïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngachïfbïfïf || ngachïfbïfïf || ngachïfbïfïf || ngachïfbïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngachïfbïfth || ngachïfbïfj || ngachïfbïfsh || ngachïfbïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngachïfbïfïfl || ngachïfbïfïfl || ngachïfbïfïfl || ngachïfbïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngachïfbïfïfïf || ngachïfbïfïfïf || ngachïfbïfïfïf || ngachïfbïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngachïfbïfïfn || ngachïfbïfïfn || ngachïfbïfïfn || ngachïfbïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngachïfbïfïforo || ngachïfbïfïforo || ngachïfbïfïforo || ngachïfbïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
